headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Kimco Realty, Raises Price Target to $31
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Alexander Goldfarb   maintains Kimco Realty (NYSE:KIM) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $28 to $31.
